title: Grade
description: IRAC grading output (spec §5.5). Auditable — every deduction traces to a rubric item id or pattern name.

overall_score.description: Calibrated 0–100. Driven by per_rubric_scores (weighted sum) minus pattern-flag penalties.

letter_grade.description: Rough mapping to A/B/C — informational only (§5.5).

per_rubric_scores.description: One entry per required_issue / required_rule / expected_counterargument. Must cover every rubric item — verify(rubric_coverage) enforces this.

justification.description: Why this score, referencing specific sentences in the answer.

pattern_flags.description: Anti-pattern hits (hedging, 'clearly', unmatched future interests, etc.). Pulled from rubric.anti_patterns + professor profile.

excerpt.description: verbatim snippet from the answer that triggered the flag

message.description: what the student should do differently

strengths.description: Short list of what the answer did well. Empty is fine but honest.

gaps.description: Issues not spotted, rules not stated, applications missing.

sample_paragraph.description: One rewritten paragraph showing an A-level version of a B-level chunk from the answer.

rubric_id.description: ID of the Rubric artifact this grade used.

sources.description: Artifact IDs consulted (rubric, professor_profile, past_exam, etc.).
